overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a rural village with traditional wooden cottages, entering a building, and exploring a dimly lit interior ritual shrine featuring a large demonic tapestry and candlelit offerings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village path with wooden cottages

events.description: turns left toward the target wooden cottage
approaches the wooden door of the cottage

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the dirt path toward a specific wooden cottage, navigating around logs and vegetation

entered.detail: Traditional log cabin with thatched roof and wooden door, destination building
Adjacent wooden cottage with decorative carved door frame
Bare deciduous trees indicating late autumn season
Unpaved trail with patches of grass and dirt
Stacked timber logs beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a rural village setting with traditional wooden cottages and leafless autumn trees. He approaches a specific wooden building, navigating around logs and vegetation, heading toward the entrance door.

scene_state.functional_zone: ritual shrine interior with demonic tapestry

events.description: transitions from bright daylight to dark candlelit interior
moves from entrance corridor into main ritual chamber with large tapestry
turns to examine the left side of the shrine room

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the dark interior and walks through a ritual shrine, examining the demonic tapestry and candlelit offerings before approaching a back door

entered.detail: Large wall hanging depicting red demonic figures in a dramatic religious scene
Wooden beams and posts forming a ritual altar with ropes
Multiple burning candles providing warm flickering illumination
Wooden table with ritual items, candles, and offerings
Heavy wooden door with iron hinges, opened to the exterior

segments.scene_description: Inside the wooden cottage, the space reveals itself as a dark ritual shrine illuminated by candlelight. A large tapestry depicting demonic imagery hangs on the far wall, surrounded by offerings and skull decorations. Geralt explores the room, walking past the shrine setup toward a door at the back.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a crisp, rural village exterior into the oppressive atmosphere of a hidden ritual shrine. It begins with Geralt walking through a settlement of traditional wooden cottages and leafless autumn trees, navigating around logs and vegetation as he approaches a specific building. As he crosses the threshold, the bright outdoor light vanishes, and the scene shifts into a dimly lit interior illuminated only by flickering candlelight. The camera then follows him deeper into the room, passing a large tapestry of demonic imagery and various skull offerings before moving toward a door at the back of the shrine.
